title: Retell a conversation
subtitle: Report who said what.
overview: Use dijo que, preguntó si, respondió que.
This is useful after calls and meetings.

items.es: Ana dijo que no podía venir el viernes.
items.en: Ana said that she could not come on Friday.

items.es: Me preguntó si podíamos vernos el sábado.
items.en: She asked me if we could meet on Saturday.

items.es: Respondí que el sábado me venía bien.
items.en: I answered that Saturday worked for me.
We also talked about the restaurant.

items.es: Al final acordamos cenar a las ocho.
items.en: In the end we agreed to have dinner at eight.
